zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris於1434年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾度福斯時，她的父親Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus31歲，母親Muria Chisholm of Chisholm27歲。她於1452年與Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年11月11日在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金享年71歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金。

nameMeanings.name: Sutherland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness): habitational name from the Scottish county of Sutherland, named with Old Norse súthr ‘south, southern’ + land ‘land’ because the territory lay south of Scandinavia and the Norse colonies in the Orkney and Shetland Islands.
History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan associated with the county of Sutherland.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris was born in 1434, in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus, was 31 and her mother, Muria Chisholm of Chisholm, was 27. She married Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray in 1452. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 11 November 1505, in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 71, and was buried in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris est née en 1434, à Duffus, Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Muria Chisholm of Chisholm, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray en 1452. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 novembre 1505, à Elgin, Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Elgin, Elginshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris 1434 in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus 31 und ihre Mutter Muria Chisholm of Chisholm 27. Sie hat 1452 Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. November 1505 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland und wurde in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris è nata il nel 1434 nel Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Muria Chisholm of Chisholm, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray nel 1452. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 novembre 1505, nel Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durrisが1434年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアダフウスで生まれた時，父Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffusは31歳，母Muria Chisholm of Chisholmは27歳であった。1452年にSir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年11月11日にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアエルジンで71歳で死去し，スコットランドエルジンシュアイアエルジンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris(이)가 1434년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 더프스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Muria Chisholm of Chisholm(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1452년 Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 11월 11일 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 엘긴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 엘긴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris nasceu em 1434, em Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Muria Chisholm of Chisholm, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray em 1452. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1505, em Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris родилась в 1434 г. в местности дуффус, элгиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Muria Chisholm of Chisholm, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray в 1452 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 11 ноября 1505 г. в местности элгин, элгиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности элгин, элгиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris nació en 1434, en Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Muria Chisholm of Chisholm, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray en 1452. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1505, en Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.
